stories.headline: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Donated $26 Million to Charities Ahead of Wedding - Variety
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have donated $26 million to charities, a rep announced, prior to their wedding.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift Wedding Details Revealed in New York Police Memo - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: A rehearsal dinner. A huge party. Hundreds of cops. And, perhaps, a big twist.

stories.headline: Madonna Confessions II Reviewed: A magnificent return to the dance floor - Mojo Magazine
stories.summary: After a long and anxious seven-year wait, Madonna finally plugs back into her clubland roots with a record of shamanic force.

stories.headline: Prince Harry Is Reportedly “Close to Tears” Over Security Fiasco As Sussex Family Trip to U.K. Hangs in the Balance - instyle.com
stories.summary: Prince Harry is reportedly "close to tears" over the security situation surrounding his visit to the U.K., where he had hoped to bring wife Meghan Markle and their children Prince Archie and Princess…

stories.headline: Sitcom star announces divorce from ‘baby momma’ after 10 years in now-deleted post - Syracuse.com
Young Washington review: Celebrate the 250th birthday of the U.S. with solid historical drama - Roger Ebert
stories.summary: A cut above the usual Founding Fathers inspirational biopic, with solid characterizations and a baseline fidelity to history.

stories.headline: Alex Rodriguez makes out with mystery woman at star-studded party after Jaclyn Cordeiro breakup - Page Six
stories.summary: In snaps obtained by Page Six, the former MLB star made out with an unidentified brunette at Michael Rubin’s Hamptons bash.

stories.headline: Michael Rubin confirms he ‘didn’t want people to have to choose’ between July 4 bash and Taylor Swift wedding - Page Six
stories.summary: Page Six reported in April that the Fanatics boss was moving his annual, star-studded event at his Hamptons home this year to July 1.
